# Account Invoice Margin Sale Sync

This module allows to synchrnize invoice margin between invoices and sale orders.

## Installation

To install this module, you need to:

1. Only install

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Go Sales > Configuration > Pricing and activate the option "Sync cost on posted invoices" if the cost in invoice lines have to be updated depending on sale order lines when the invoice is validated.

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. No instructions needed.
